name: Chili Bean Salad (Lacto)
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Canned kidney beans - rinsed and drained
1/2 cup Green bell peppers, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine rinsed and drained kidney beans with finely chopped onions and green bell peppers in a large bowl.
2. In a small bowl, mix together the yogurt and spices (chili powder, garlic powder, ground cumin, oregano, and salt).
3. Add the spice mixture to the bean mixture and stir until well blended.
4. Chill the salad for several hours to allow the flavors to meld.
5. Stir before serving.
6. Serve over a bed of lettuce and add a piece of cornbread for an easy lunch with Mexican flair.
Nutrition (per serving): 122 calories, Total Fat 1 g (4% of calories)
Source: Lean Luscious & Meatless, Page(s): 98
D/L from Prodigy 12-14-94. Recipe collection of Sue Smith.
